calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Ruby U. Faagua and Susana P. Faagua.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Vivian Lerche, Esq. appeared for plaintiff National Collegiate Master Student Loan Trust - I, A Delaware Statutory Trust(s).
No appearance by defendants Ruby U. Faagua and Susana P. Faagua.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on July 31, 2017.
Defaults were entered against defendants Ruby U. Faagua and Susana P. Faagua on February 9, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 8, 2018.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on May 7, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff National Collegiate Master Student Loan Trust - I, A Delaware Statutory Trust(s), and against the Defaulted Defendants Ruby U. Faagua and Susana P. Faagua, as follows:

Damages - $44,907.61.
Costs - $700.70.

Total - $45,608.31.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Continued To Jun-13-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Continued To Mar-07-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
